column1: # Output-flag worklist -- RESIDUAL after the 2026-07 output-flag write sweep. The 150 real
# write-path flags are now gated (pathgates.toml [roles.X]); these ~65 rows are the VERIFIED
# format-only / non-path flags that harmlessly auto-approve (an output FORMAT like `-o json`, a
# column list, a GHC option, a boolean, or a non-existent flag -- the tool errors or ignores, it
# every output-flag hole must be listed here (a NEW one fails closed => a real writer to gate), and
# a listed entry that stops auto-approving fails as stale. The list only shrinks. Format: <cmd>\t<flag>
